title: Canonical score-result RCA UX + information-gap explainability

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing canonical single-renderer RCA UX: remove duplicate per-item cards from topic/category sections, route all inspection through score-result detail, add info-gap diagnostics payload+banner, and validate with 50-sample feedback run.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented canonical single-renderer RCA UX and information-gap diagnostics. Runtime validation completed with evaluation d086da92-c220-4eb4-b1d8-a13dfcf61a81 (max-samples=50). Verified payload fields: item_classifications_all count=24, analysis_scope.topic_assignment_scope=exemplar_only, category_diagnostics.information_gap present with transcript-unavailable diagnostics. Frontend tests and build passed.
